CODE.description: Site fixes, bug fixes, feature builds, scripts, automation code
CODE.agent: Claude Code in VS Code terminal
CODE.instruction: Open VS Code terminal, run: claude --cwd ~/Desktop/JARVIS_EMPIRE
CODE.notes: For site work, always check ~/Documents/STC/ first. Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys on git push.

VIDEO.description: AI video generation, lip sync, subtitles, video editing and download
VIDEO.agent: Claude Code with video pipeline context
VIDEO.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with video tools context. Check tools/ for LTX-Video, reclip, Claw3D first.
VIDEO.notes: Installed: LTX-Video, reclip, Claw3D. Top priority clones: Wan2.1, MuseTalk, LatentSync, HunyuanVideo. Higgsfield needs account setup.

CONTENT.description: Social posts, captions, FDM content, social scheduling, thumbnails, graphic design
CONTENT.agent: Claude Code with FDM content context
CONTENT.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with FDM context loaded
CONTENT.notes: FDM = FutureDigitalMusic brand. IG: @shifttheculture.ai on Chrome, @zachpampu on phone. Top priority clone: Postiz (20K stars, AI social scheduler).

MUSIC.description: Beat production, track uploads, releases, licensing, playlists, Digital Currency, voice cloning, TTS, stem separation
MUSIC.agent: Claude Code with music ops context
MUSIC.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with music production and licensing context
MUSIC.notes: Distribution via Digital Currency (signed in). Beat Clone Engine powered by ACE-Step (top priority clone). Mix Master Engine powered by Spleeter (top priority clone). Voice cloning: Fish Speech (18K stars) or Chatterbox (laptop-friendly).

BETTING.description: Sports bets, predictions, DFS, Kalshi, DraftKings, FanDuel, Kronos trading system
BETTING.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with Kalshi/DK/FD context and today's slate
BETTING.notes: Bankroll: $5 each on Kalshi, DraftKings, FanDuel. Read TODAYS_BETTING_SLATE.md first, follow KALSHI_DAILY_PLAYBOOK.md protocol. Kronos is an AI trading system in tools/.

JOBS.description: Job applications, resume, outreach, career ops, certifications
JOBS.agent: Claude Code with career ops context
JOBS.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with resume and hitlist context loaded
JOBS.notes: Tier 1 jobs listed in JOB_APPLICATIONS_HITLIST.md. Resume at deliverables/ZACHARY_PAMPU_RESUME.md. Send from info@shifttheculture.media. 23 certs pending.

AUTOMATION.description: Workflow automation, integrations, scraping, scheduling, process management
AUTOMATION.agent: Claude Code with automation and integration context
AUTOMATION.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with automation tools context
AUTOMATION.notes: n8n installed at tools/n8n-mcp/. Zapier SDK available via npm. pm2 available via npm install -g pm2. Apify is cloud-only.

MONETIZATION.description: Affiliate programs, billing, subscriptions, referrals, revenue tracking
MONETIZATION.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with monetization and revenue context
MONETIZATION.notes: Beat Clone Engine + Mix Master Engine are STC SaaS products. Lago = self-hosted Stripe. Weferral = self-hosted affiliate tracking. Gumroad payout blocked — needs support ticket.

ANALYTICS.description: Web analytics, product analytics, audience insights, A/B testing
ANALYTICS.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with analytics tools context
ANALYTICS.notes: serpbear installed (SEO rank tracking). Priority clones: Umami (34K stars, GA replacement), PostHog (product analytics), Plausible (lightweight).

OPS.description: COO tasks, system status, infrastructure, Notion, planning, admin
OPS.agent: Claude Code COO agent with full infrastructure context
OPS.instruction: Open VS Code terminal as COO agent, read DISPATCH_RULES.md first
OPS.notes: Full COO mode. Check session count, COO turn count, computer-use lock status on startup. DISPATCHER_HANDOFF.md has full context.

RESEARCH.description: Market research, competitor analysis, data lookups, information gathering, tool evaluation
RESEARCH.agent: Claude Code with web search tools
RESEARCH.instruction: Open VS Code terminal with web search MCP tools available
RESEARCH.notes: Use Exa MCP for deep research. Save outputs to 3_OUTPUT/. Update MASTER_INDEX.md with findings. All 112 arsenal tools documented in NEW_TOOLS_ARSENAL.md.

DEPLOY.description: Cloudflare deployments, DNS changes, Pages pushes, site launches
DEPLOY.agent: Claude Code deploy agent with Cloudflare context
DEPLOY.instruction: Open VS Code terminal in STC source directory, verify Cloudflare auth before deploying
DEPLOY.notes: STC site auto-deploys via Cloudflare Pages on git push to main. zachpampu.com pending rebuild — don't deploy placeholder. SPF record missing — documented in SPF_RECORD_STATUS.md.

DISPATCH.description: Hub routing, triage, fanout, cross-fleet orchestration, inter-agent handoff
DISPATCH.agent: Claude Code fleet dispatcher with full routes + INBOX fanout context
DISPATCH.instruction: Run fanout.py to target the right specialty INBOX. Hub-and-spoke pattern per dispatcher/HUB_AND_SPOKE.md.
DISPATCH.notes: Dispatcher owns the classify+supercharge+fanout pipeline. Fleet labels: CODE, OPS, DISPATCH, RESEARCH, DEPLOY, AUDIT, DELEGATE, FAMILY.

AUDIT.description: Safety, security, code review, PHI/compliance, pre-flight validation, red-team
AUDIT.agent: Claude Code audit agent with security-reviewer subagent access
AUDIT.instruction: Delegate to security-reviewer subagent for CRITICAL/HIGH findings. Block merges on CRITICAL.
AUDIT.notes: Never ship code with CRITICAL findings. Hardcoded secrets are immediate STOP.

DELEGATE.description: Spawning parallel subagents, splitting work across fleet, multi-specialty tasks
DELEGATE.agent: Claude Code delegate coordinator (spawns subagents via Agent tool)
DELEGATE.instruction: Break the ask into parallel chunks, spawn Agent calls in a single message for concurrency.
DELEGATE.notes: Prefer parallel execution when chunks are independent. Merge findings in a single report.

FAMILY.description: Personal and family-scoped work for ZP (e.g. documents for dad, music industry intel for family), kept separate from STC revenue work
FAMILY.agent: Claude Code family agent with scoped personal context
FAMILY.instruction: Pull from memory + rework documents for ZP's dad. Keep outputs in ~/Documents/family/ not in STC dirs.
FAMILY.notes: This lane is personal, not revenue. Never mix with STC deliverables.
